CURRENT DATASET STATE:

{metrics}

SCHEMA:
{schema}

AVAILABLE ACTIONS:
- fill_missing: Fill missing values (params: column, strategy)
- remove_duplicates: Remove duplicate rows (params: subset)
- normalize: Normalize numeric column (params: column, method)
- fix_types: Fix data types automatically (no params)
- remove_outliers: Remove outliers from column (params: column, method)
- drop_column: Remove entire column (params: column)
- encode_categorical: Encode categorical column (params: column, method)
- handle_text: Clean text column (params: column)

INSTRUCTIONS:
Analyze the current state and decide the single best next action to take.
Your response must be ONLY a valid JSON object with no other text.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
{
  "action": {
    "type": "action_name",
    "params": {
      "parameter_name": "parameter_value"
    }
  }
}
